narrative:
Cleveland Municipal City Sd city school district has 237,979 registered voters, with 64.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 27.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.5% D−R vs +43.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
